# OnMultifamily.com
## Ontario's Leading Multifamily Investment Sales Advisory Team

> Led by Dayma Itamunoala, Senior Vice President at Colliers International, specializing in apartment building investment sales across Ontario, Canada. Over $1.2 billion in completed transactions. 81% closing rate. 4,200+ units sold. 14,000+ newsletter subscribers.

## About
OnMultifamily is Ontario's most active multifamily investment sales advisory team, operating under Colliers International. The team specializes in institutional-grade apartment building transactions across the Greater Toronto Area, Ottawa, Hamilton, Niagara, Kitchener-Waterloo, London, Sault Ste. Marie, and other Ontario markets. The team handles everything from boutique walk-ups to large-scale portfolios.

## Services
- Multifamily Investment Sales Advisory
- Portfolio Valuations and Opinions of Value
- Market Intelligence and Quarterly Research Reports
- Capital Markets Advisory
- CMHC MLI Select Financing Coordination
- Transaction Management and Due Diligence
- Seniors Housing Investment Sales

## Market Leadership
- $1,200,000,000+ in completed multifamily sales
- 81% closing rate on listings taken
- 4,200+ apartment units sold
- 14,000+ weekly newsletter subscribers
- Q1 2026: $569M in GTA multifamily volume across 20 trades (228.7% YoY increase)

## Current Active Listings (as of May 2026)
1. Oak House, 700 Spadina Avenue, Toronto - 50% leasehold interest in U of T student residence (with University of Toronto)
2. Chestnut Residence, 89 Chestnut Street, Toronto - 50% leasehold interest in U of T student residence (1,100+ students)
3. 231 Vaughan Road, Toronto - 52-unit apartment building, Oakwood-Vaughan
4. 149 Cosburn Avenue, Toronto - 35-unit apartment building, East York
5. 116 Spencer Avenue, Toronto - 35-unit apartment building, Parkdale
6. 1083 Main Street East, Hamilton - Multifamily investment opportunity
7. 17-19 Collier Street, St. Catharines - 32-unit renovated multifamily, NOI $481,606
8. 165 Colborne Avenue, Richmond Hill - 40-unit multifamily (Under Contract)
9. 56 South Forster Park Drive, Oakville - 15-unit low-rise (Under Contract)
10. 49 St. Mary's River Drive, Sault Ste. Marie - 102-unit apartment building (Under Contract)

## Free Tools
- **CMHC Debt Underwriting Calculator**: https://www.onmultifamily.com/resources/cmhc-calculator
  Size CMHC-insured multifamily debt using institutional methodology. Live CMB yields, DSCR/LTV dual constraint, MLI Select scenarios, updated premium schedule (Advice 264).
- **Bond Yield Tracker**: https://www.onmultifamily.com/resources/bond-yields
  Live Government of Canada bond yields, CMB spreads, Bank of Canada rate. Updated daily.

## Market Data (Q1 2026)
- Bank of Canada overnight rate: 2.25%
- 5-Year GoC yield: ~3.18-3.27%
- 5-Year CMB yield: ~3.33-3.42%
- CMHC insured all-in rate: ~3.90-4.00%
- Conventional 5-year fixed: 4.25-4.75%
- GTA average cap rate: 4.95% (Q1 2026)
- GTA average price per suite: $289,047 (Q1 2026)

## Notable Recent Transactions (Q1 2026, GTA)
- Starlight Investments acquired Hanard Portfolio: 408 units, $126.4M ($310K/suite)
- Homestead acquired 15 Canyon Ave, North York: 234 units, $87.8M ($375K/suite)
- Upperside Apartments acquired 3950 Lawrence Ave: 309 units, $80M ($259K/suite)
- CLV Group acquired 3030 Prospect St, Burlington: 103 units, $30.4M ($295K/suite)
